seoDescription: Prushko Plumbing is a family-owned plumbing, heating and air contractor in Glen Ellen, CA serving the Sonoma Valley since 1976 — repairs, water heaters, sewer, gas, remodels and new construction. CSLB #384098.
heroSubheading: Prushko Plumbing is a second-generation, family-owned plumber based in Glen Ellen, serving Sonoma, Glen Ellen and the Sonoma Valley with full plumbing service, water heaters, sewer, gas and remodel work since 1976. CSLB #384098.
highlights: Serving Glen Ellen & the Sonoma Valley
Repairs, water heaters, sewer, gas & remodels
aboutBody: Prushko Plumbing was started by Ron and Linda Prushko in Sonoma in 1976 and has served the Sonoma Valley as a family-owned and operated business for more than 40 years. When Ron retired in 2012, the family business passed to the next generation, keeping the same hands-on, neighbor-to-neighbor service the area has relied on for decades.

From everyday repairs, water heaters and drain work to sewer, gas lines, remodels and new construction, Prushko handles residential and commercial plumbing across Glen Ellen, Sonoma and the surrounding valley. The company is licensed under California contractor's license #384098.

services.title: Plumbing Repair & Service
services.description: Full repair and service for leaks, fixtures, drains and everyday plumbing problems.

services.title: Water Heaters
services.description: Repair and replacement of tank and tankless water heaters.

services.title: Sewer & Gas Lines
services.description: Sewer service and gas-line work for homes and businesses across the Sonoma Valley.

services.title: Remodels & New Construction
services.description: Plumbing for remodels and new residential and commercial construction.

notes: Sources: BBB (bbb.org Glen Ellen profile), Yelp (yelp.com/biz/prushko-plumbing-glen-ellen-3), BuildZoom, Yellow Pages, business's own thin site. Website status = BAD/THIN — prushkoplumbing.com exists but is a lightweight template build (Ziplocal/Elegant Themes; generic stock copy, no real team/about depth, many near-identical 'areas-served' pages) — qualifies as a bad-website target. History: founded by Ron & Linda Prushko in Sonoma in 1976; family-owned 40+ years; passed to son-in-law when Ron retired in 2012 (per BBB/business profile). CSLB #384098 (Ron Prushko Plumbing & Heating). Phone (707) 996-1850; email prushkoplumbing@gmail.com; PO Box 159 / 14136 Arnold Dr, Glen Ellen 95442. NOTE: review platforms are thin (Yelp/BBB show 0 reviews) so NO star rating asserted and testimonials left empty — trust signal rests on CSLB #384098 + the verifiable 1976 family-business history, not on a fabricated rating. Photo-less build.
